meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve no version control (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no version control. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Master Version Control: Antigravity Template for Students
content.seo_description: Stop losing code. Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to master version control and build professional-grade software projects.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template solves version control chaos by automating repository initialization, branch protection, and CI/CD pipelines. By integrating this with Claude Code, you transform a disorganized codebase into a professional, production-ready environment, ensuring every line of code is tracked, tested, and ready for your portfolio.
content.intro:
The silent killer of every student developer’s career is the 'folder-of-folders' syndrome. You’ve been there: final_v2, final_v2_real, and the inevitable catastrophe when a rogue delete wipes out a week of work. Without version control, you aren't just writing code; you are gambling with your progress, your sanity, and your future career potential.

But the industry doesn't wait for your files to be organized. The solution is the Antigravity project template—a rigorous, opinionated scaffolding tool designed to force best practices from day one. When combined with the raw intelligence of Claude Code, you stop fighting your own file system and start building software like a senior engineer at a top-tier firm.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Standardize your project structure by pulling the industry-proven Antigravity base. This enforces a clean separation of concerns from the very first commit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new production-grade repository using the Antigravity base template with standard TypeScript/Next.js configuration.

steps.title: Configure Automated Git Hooks
steps.description: Prevent bad code from ever touching your history by setting up pre-commit hooks that validate syntax and type safety.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure Husky and lint-staged to run on every commit, ensuring no code enters the history without passing the linter.

steps.title: Establish Branching Strategy
steps.description: Use Claude Code to enforce a feature-branch workflow. This keeps your main branch pristine and ready for deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up a git flow branching strategy where feature branches are required for all changes and main is protected.

steps.title: Automate Documentation Generation
steps.description: Stop manually writing READMEs. Use the template's built-in tools to keep your project documentation synced with your code changes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a professional README.md that tracks project milestones and includes a dynamic changelog section.

steps.title: Deploy to CI/CD Pipeline
steps.description: Connect your repository to an automated pipeline that tests and builds your code every time you push.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds, tests, and validates the project on every push to the main branch.

pro_tips: Always use atomic commits: each commit should represent one, and only one, logical change to the codebase.
Utilize 'Git Ignore' generators early; leaking environment variables is the number one mistake for junior developers.
Treat your commit messages as technical documentation for your future self; use the Conventional Commits specification.
Enable branch protection rules on GitHub immediately after initialization to prevent accidental force-pushes to main.
Review the 'diff' of every automated change generated by Claude Code to understand exactly how the tool is modifying your project architecture.
content.next_steps: Once your project is scaffolded and version-controlled, focus on building your first feature. Use Claude Code to iterate rapidly, and remember to commit every time you reach a functional milestone to maintain a clean, impressive contribution history for your portfolio.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped with the same architectural foundation used by top-tier engineering teams. Don't let your code disappear into the void of local folders. Build with intention, track your progress, and show the world what you can create. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
